_comment_purpose: Deployment-specific parameter overrides for Source Data Dictionary generation. This file deep-merges over common.json. See metadata/README.md for merge rules.
_comment_models: AI model endpoints for the semantic analysis agents. These should be Foundation Model API serving endpoints in Databricks. Producer generates SDD content; Critic reviews and refines it per Charter §2 'LLM/agent responsibilities'.

models._comment: Use Foundation Model API endpoint names (e.g., 'databricks-meta-llama-3-1-70b-instruct') or custom Model Serving endpoint names. Both endpoints can be the same or different models depending on workload optimization.

_comment_identity: Authorization boundary enforcement per Charter §6. Validates the execution context matches the authorized principal and workspace. source_access_granted must be explicitly 'true' to proceed with source metadata discovery.

identity._comment: workspace_host: Full HTTPS URL of the Databricks workspace (AWS: https://<id>.cloud.databricks.com, Azure: https://<name>.azuredatabricks.net). execution_principal: Email or service principal name that is authorized to run source discovery jobs. source_access_granted: Must be string 'true' to authorize source metadata read access (security gate, not a boolean).

_comment_contracts: Override contract set version if this deployment needs a different version than common.json default.

contracts._comment: Contract schema version - must match the deployed DDL in the control schema. Updated to 0.3.0 after registration field removal (solution_run v0.2.0 → v0.3.0).

_comment_versioning: Override versioning if this deployment uses different skill/prompt/config versions.

versioning._comment: Increment when this sdd_param.json changes materially. Enables Charter §6 reproducibility: 'reproduce outputs from versioned... configuration snapshots.'

_comment_governance: Override governance rules for this deployment environment (dev/staging/prod may have different approval requirements).

governance._comment: Charter §6: 'prevent automatic approval of material model artifacts.' Override these for environment-specific reviewer/approver groups (e.g., 'prod_approvers' in production).

_comment_execution: Override execution limits for this deployment (dev may have lower limits than prod).

execution._comment: Low temperature (0.1) ensures consistent semantic interpretation. Adjust cost_limit_per_run_usd based on environment budget (dev: $50, prod: higher).
